datadog.name: Datadog
datadog.notable: Revenue $2.1B FY2023, 28% YoY growth. ARR growing but sales efficiency declining post-2022.

newrelic.name: New Relic
newrelic.status: Private (taken private by Francisco Partners + TPG, 2023)
newrelic.notable: Went private Nov 2023 after struggling public valuation. New ownership likely to push aggressive discounting to win market share back from Datadog.

honeycomb.name: Honeycomb
honeycomb.notable: Still burning cash. Under pressure to reach profitability before next raise. May be flexible on pricing for logos.

grafana.name: Grafana Labs
grafana.notable: Well-capitalized. Open-source flywheel drives low CAC. Can afford aggressive Cloud pricing to convert OSS users.

splunk.name: Splunk
splunk.notable: Cisco acquisition complete. Roadmap uncertainty is real. Enterprise customers are actively exploring alternatives. Strong negotiating angle for ShadowBuyer.
